synthetic:0fbbae0429f6dd5bd67ce72d371093.reason: The flagged dependabot.yml entry for github-actions (lines 14-20) does not set a cooldown period, and no cooldown configuration exists anywhere in the repository. Without a cooldown, Dependabot will immediately propose updates to newly published package versions, creating a supply-chain risk where a freshly published malicious version could be offered to maintainers before the community has time to detect it.

The result is passed to time.Sleep and never used for cryptographic purposes such as keys, tokens, or secrets. CWE-338 applies to using weak PRNGs for cryptographic operations, which is not the case here.
